# mailu Provider

Manage Mailu domains, users, aliases, and related mail objects through the Mailu admin API.

Known limitations: Terraform state must be protected by the selected backend, generated Mailu token values are not persisted in state, DNS records are managed by DNS providers, and Mailu object identities are normalized to lowercase.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) Mailu API endpoint, for example `https://mail.example.com/api/v1`. Can also be set with `MAILU_ENDPOINT`.
- `insecure_skip_tls_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification. Can also be set with `MAILU_INSECURE_SKIP_TLS_VERIFY`. Intended only for lab environments.
- `max_retries` (Number) Maximum number of retries for retryable API responses. Can also be set with `MAILU_MAX_RETRIES`. Defaults to 2.
- `timeout_seconds` (Number) HTTP client timeout in seconds. Can also be set with `MAILU_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`. Defaults to 30.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Mailu API token. Can also be set with `MAILU_API_TOKEN`.
- `user_agent` (String) User-Agent sent to the Mailu API. Can also be set with `MAILU_USER_AGENT`.
